       Standard X-Ray Grids.       
  • Superior construction of lead strips and aluminum inter-spacers, with smooth, enameled aluminum covers, sealed against dirt and moisture.
  • Grids may also be ordered with carbon fiber composite covers.
  • For added protection of your valuable grids and convenience of handling and operation, these grids can be installed in various forms of grid encasement's: Flat Lexan® encasement's, grid caps, Lexan® encasement's with cassette channels and grid cassettes.


    • Selection of High Precision Materials / Durability & Inspection

  • To obtain the most effective X-Ray transmission and absorption, as well as grid density uniformity and precise geometric arrangement for strip focusing, these grid are manufactured utilizing the finest precision materials, such as aluminum strips with a purity of 99.99% and a thickness tolerance of ±0.02mm, and lead strips with a purity of 99.85% and a thickness tolerance of ±0.001mm.
  • Each grid strip is laminated and baked after the gluing procedure. This ensures absolute rigity between the strips, as well as heat and moisture resistance and completely prevents warping and cracking over the course of time. Each grid is subjected to radiographic testing prior to shipment, and only those grids which have passed the test for perfect strip alignment are delivered to the customer. The test film supplied with all the grids is your assurance of quality.

    • Looking for a grid/cassette/plate holder to go with your grid?

Grid Encasement can be ordered along with your grid and are found futher down on this page!

Parallel Grid

  • Parallel grids are used for operational research and traumatology since exact centering is impossible in this case. The scattered radiation absorbing strips are vertical and parallel to the grid surface. The strips, generally, run parallel to the long dimension of the grid. In order to get a vivid radiograph, focal distance of parallel grids must be 150cm-infinity since the scattered radiation absorbing strips are not exactly parallel to the diverging radiation.


    • NOTE: Be sure to request Focal Distance when ordering.
    Focal Distances available: FFD 26"-32"; FFD 34"-44"; FFD 48"-72"; FFD 62"-72"; FFD Parallel

    FAQ:
    In which direction do the lead strips run?
    Standard is in the long dimension - i.e. the widest direction of the grid. If ordered as a "decubitus grid" then the strips will run in the short (narrowest) dimension. Up charge fee applies for decubitus.

[HTMLCS] WARNING|WCAG2AAA.Principle1.Guideline1_3.1_3_1.H49.Center|center||Semantic markup should be used to mark emphasised or special text so that it can be programmatically determined.|
This product simply encases your grid in a thin layer of high-impact Lexan® plastic on all sides. These prices do not include the grid. This particular product does NOT provide for any type of attachment to a cassette. Typically you would just lay your encased grid on top of the cassette for table-top procedures, or, slide it into grid channels/tracks of a chest board equipped with such a track. If you need to lock or connect your cassette to the grid to keep them aligned, you will want to select one of the other options below. Flat encasements are also available with flanged edges to fit wall holders which have a fixed ¼ inch grid channel. Please Note: The prices shown here are for this optional/additional cost encasement to be added to the bare grid you are ordering from our selection above. You must order your encasement at the time you order your new grid. If you wish to have an encasement added to an existing grid you already own, you will be required to ship your grid to us to have it encased. Non-Soyee brand grids will be charged an additional $25 fee (in addition to the prices shown here) to be encased.

Available only in 10x12", 24x30cm, and 14x17"

The XRAC Grid Encasement also fully encases your grid in white Tufak™ Polycarbonate plastic, but has a set of polyethylene channels on the back where the cassette is inserted into the grid encasement. After the exam, you simply slide the cassette back out. For CR, DR and standard grids only.

Please Note: The prices shown here are for this optional/additional cost encasement to be added to the bare grid you are ordering from our selection above. You must order your encasement at the time you order your new grid. If you wish to have an encasement added to an existing grid you already own, you will be required to ship your grid to us to have it encased. Non-Soyee brand grids will be charged an additional $25 fee (in addition to the prices shown here) to be encased.

Available in standard grid/cassette sizes up to 14" X 17". Not available for bucky grid sizes (18x18 & 17-1/4x18-7/8)

 This product is similar to the standard XRAC Grid Encasement except it's constructed of durable and light weight aluminum with closed welded corners. It also incorporates channels on the back where the cassette is inserted into the grid encasement. After the exam, you simply slide the cassette back out. Please Note: The prices shown here are for this optional/additional cost encasement to be added to the bare grid you are ordering from our selection above. You must order your encasement at the time you order your new grid. If you wish to have an encasement added to an existing grid you already own, you will be required to ship your grid to us to have it encased. Non-Soyee brand grids will be charged an additional $25 fee (in addition to the prices shown here) to be encased.

Available in standard grid/cassette sizes up to 14" X 17". Not available for bucky grid sizes (18x18 & 17-1/4x18-7/8)

 This product is identical to the XRAC II Grid Encasement, except, it is slightly smaller so as to allow easy storage in the tip-out cassette drawers of popular mobile x-ray systems. Constructed of durable and light weight aluminum with closed welded corners, this product incorporates channels on the back where the cassette is inserted into the grid encasement. After the exam, you simply slide the cassette back out. Please Note: The prices shown here are for this optional/additional cost encasement to be added to the bare grid you are ordering from our selection above. You must order your encasement at the time you order your new grid. If you wish to have an encasement added to an existing grid you already own, you will be required to ship your grid to us to have it encased. Non-Soyee brand grids will be charged an additional $25 fee (in addition to the prices shown here) to be encased.

Available ONLY in 14"x17"

 This product simply encases your grid inside the Polycarbonate faceplate. Patients can stand directly on top without damaging the grid or the underlying film cassette or CR plate. Your new grid (ordered from the listing at the top of this page) becomes a permanent part of this encasement and cannot be utilized separately. Prices shown here are for this optional encasement and do not include the price of the grid you select. Once ordered with a new grid, your selected grid will be encased inside this product and billed as two separate items. You will receive just one combined product. A label on the top of the encasement will show the specification of the grid within.

  • Bariatric Weight capacity - up to 750lbs!
  • Available 2 Sizes (14x17 and 14x17)
  • Made of durable PVC with Polycarbonate face plate!
  • Will not crack or split and is impervious to water!
  • Non-slip grips keep the Cassette from slipping on hard surfaces!
  • Easy to Clean!
  • Tested by Massachusetts Materials Research, Inc.
